articles.title: Dashboard Overview
articles.content:
The dashboard provides a comprehensive view of your delivery operations. Key features include:

- Real-time order tracking
- Revenue analytics
- Shopper performance metrics
- Delivery status updates

articles.title: First Steps
articles.content:
1. Log in to your account
2. Complete your profile setup
3. Configure your notification preferences
4. Explore the dashboard sections

articles.title: Creating an Order
articles.content:
To create a new order:

1. Click the 'New Order' button
2. Select the delivery location
3. Choose items from available shops
4. Review and confirm the order details

articles.title: Tracking Orders
articles.content:
Track your orders in real-time:

- View current order status
- See estimated delivery times
- Contact assigned shoppers
- Get delivery confirmations

articles.title: Understanding Delivery Settings
articles.content:
Our delivery system is highly configurable to meet your business needs:

### Base Fees
- **Delivery Fee**: Standard charge for delivery service
- **Service Fee**: Additional fee for platform usage
- **Distance Surcharge**: Extra charges based on delivery distance

### Time-Based Settings
- **Rush Hour Pricing**: Increased rates during peak hours
- **Off-Peak Discounts**: Reduced rates during slower periods
- **Maximum Delivery Time**: Standard 90-minute delivery window

### Delivery Zones
1. **Zone Configuration**
   - Define service areas
   - Set zone-specific pricing
   - Configure coverage boundaries

2. **Zone Types**
   - Urban (high density)
   - Suburban (medium density)
   - Rural (extended range)

### Time Slots
- **Scheduling Windows**
   - Morning slots (6 AM - 12 PM)
   - Afternoon slots (12 PM - 6 PM)
   - Evening slots (6 PM - 10 PM)

- **Capacity Management**
   - Shopper availability
   - Order volume limits
   - Buffer time between deliveries

### Special Conditions
1. **Weather Adjustments**
   - Rain/snow surcharge
   - Extreme weather protocols
   - Safety guidelines

2. **Holiday Settings**
   - Special holiday rates
   - Modified delivery times
   - Service availability

3. **Priority Delivery**
   - Express delivery options
   - Premium service fees
   - Guaranteed delivery times

articles.title: Understanding Shopper Performance
articles.content:
Shoppers are ranked based on several metrics:

### Performance Badges

🏆 Elite (95%+ on-time)
- Exceptional performance
- Consistently delivers on time
- Highest priority for new orders

⭐ Great (90-94% on-time)
- Very reliable
- Rarely delivers late
- High priority for orders

👍 Good (80-89% on-time)
- Meets expectations
- Generally reliable

⚠️ Needs Work (70-79% on-time)
- Below target
- Improvement needed
- Additional monitoring

❌ Poor (<70% on-time)
- Significantly below expectations
- Requires immediate attention

### Time Targets
- Standard delivery: 1 hour 30 minutes maximum
- Timer starts at order acceptance
- Includes pickup and delivery time

articles.title: Managing Shoppers
articles.content:
Effectively manage your delivery team:

1. View shopper profiles
2. Monitor performance metrics
3. Handle scheduling
4. Process payments
5. Review customer feedback

articles.title: Wallet Management
articles.content:
Managing financial transactions:

- View wallet balances
- Process withdrawals
- Track earnings
- Handle refunds

articles.title: Payment Processing
articles.content:
Understanding payment flows:

1. Order payment collection
2. Shopper earnings calculation
3. Service fee breakdown
4. Refund processing

articles.title: Creating Support Tickets
articles.content:
To create a support ticket:

1. Navigate to Support section
2. Click 'New Ticket'
3. Select issue category
4. Provide details
5. Attach relevant files
6. Submit ticket

articles.title: Tracking Issue Resolution
articles.content:
Monitor support ticket status:

- View ticket history
- Check resolution progress
- Communicate with support team
- Rate support experience
